description: You must output ONE of the following two structural states based on the context validation.

oneOf.description: State 1: SUCCESS. Use this when all objects exist and a routine can be safely constructed.

properties.recipe_name: Short, descriptive title of the routine

steps.description: THIS IS REQUIRED FOR EVERY STEP: Brief text explanation of what this specific step does
steps.parameters: Object containing arguments specific to the chosen action

oneOf.description: State 2: ERROR. Use this if an object is missing, ambiguous, or the command violates workspace constraints.

properties.message: Detailed natural language explanation of why the command failed execution.
